0.name: New Price-Sensitive
0.description: Short-tenure customers with lower spending, often on month-to-month contracts
0.retention_strategy: Offer loyalty discounts and contract upgrade incentives to build commitment early

1.name: Loyal Premium
1.description: Long-tenure, high-spending customers with stable contracts and multiple services
1.retention_strategy: Provide VIP perks, priority support, and exclusive early-access offers to maintain loyalty

2.name: At-Risk Mid-Tier
2.description: Medium-tenure customers showing signs of disengagement with moderate spending
2.retention_strategy: Proactive outreach with personalized bundles and satisfaction surveys

3.name: Digital Streamers
3.description: Customers with high data usage and streaming services, tech-savvy profile
3.retention_strategy: Enhance digital experience, offer streaming partnerships and data boost packages
